TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kincac, title = Kincac, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kincac} }

S.FORM: == kincac 璀﹀療 == Adihay ko kasasiroma no Kincac a sowal, o Tayhing, Tayring, Imeng ato kincal han no roma. Nikaorira, o misafangcalay tonini a sekal, micepetay to maliangay a tamdaw, I Dipongan ho o kincac ko mikowanay to niyaro' no 'Amis, cowa ko kofa, orasaka, tadamatalaway ko cimacima to kincac, away ko caay ka ngodo to kincac, tadamarorayay to kiso sanay mipangiha ano ma'araw i cowa. O misimaway to niyaro' ko tayal nangra, sa ka adihay ko masamaamaanay a tayal, matiya to o misatofangay ko pinengneng no tamdaw, patinako han, ira ko makaratay no waco tahidangen ko kincac, ira ko malapoi'ay a kararamoday mitahidang to kincac, tadamisafaay to to kincac ko kalotamdaw haratengen. Ano awaay ko kincac i cima a sato ko mamisimaw mamipa'ading to niyaro', onini ko haharateng a mingodo a mipalata'ang to tayal nangra. tatodong 韬唤(misinanot | o yin-se-ma no pisinanot) O milifetan konini a tayal, caay ka kangtan, ira kono pilifet to tireng, pilifet to tanek ato o roma a kitakit a sowal, pilicay aca to tireng no niyah, masamaanay ko harateng no miso a malakincac, tadamaroray ko tayal.
S.PHON: == kin师a师 ** == a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u kasasiro~uma no~u kin师a师 a so~uwa删, o~u taj魔i艐, tajri艐, im蓹艐 ato~u kin师a删 魔an no~u ro~uma. nikao~urira, o~u misafa艐师a删aj to~unini a s蓹ka删, mi师蓹p蓹taj to~u ma删ia艐aj a tam涩~僧aw, i 涩~僧ipo~u艐an 魔o~u o~u kin师a师 ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u nijaro~u省 no~u 省amis, 师o~uwa ko~u ko~ufa, o~urasaka, ta涩~僧amata删awaj ko~u 师ima师ima to~u kin师a师, awaj ko~u 师aaj ka 艐o~u涩~僧o~u to~u kin师a师, ta涩~僧amaro~urajaj to~u kiso~u sanaj mipa艐i魔a ano~u ma省araw i 师o~uwa. o~u misimawaj to~u nijaro~u省 ko~u taja删 na艐ra, sa ka a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u masamaamaanaj a taja删, matija to~u o~u misato~ufa艐aj ko~u pin蓹艐n蓹艐 no~u tam涩~僧aw, patinako~u 魔an, ira ko~u makarataj no~u wa师o~u ta魔i涩~僧a艐蓹n ko~u kin师a师, ira ko~u ma删apo~ui省aj a kararamo~u涩~僧aj mita魔i涩~僧a艐 to~u kin师a师, ta涩~僧amisafaaj to~u to~u kin师a师 ko~u ka删o~utam涩~僧aw 魔arat蓹艐蓹n. ano~u awaaj ko~u kin师a师 i 师ima a sato~u ko~u mamisimaw mamipa省a涩~僧i艐 to~u nijaro~u省, o~unini ko~u 魔a魔arat蓹艐 a mi艐o~u涩~僧o~u a mipa删ata省a艐 to~u taja删 na艐ra. tato~u涩~僧o~u艐 **(misinano~ut | o~u jin-s蓹-ma no~u pisinano~ut) o~u mi删if蓹tan ko~unini a taja删, 师aaj ka ka艐tan, ira ko~uno~u pi删if蓹t to~u tir蓹艐, pi删if蓹t to~u tan蓹k ato~u o~u ro~uma a kitakit a so~uwa删, pi删i师aj a师a to~u tir蓹艐 no~u nija魔, masamaanaj ko~u 魔arat蓹艐 no~u miso~u a ma删akin师a师, ta涩~僧amaro~uraj ko~u taja删.
S.FORM: == kincac 璀﹀療 == Adihay ko kasasiroma no Kincac a sowal, o Tayhing, Tayring, Imeng ato kincal han no roma. Nikaorira, o misafangcalay tonini a sekal, micepetay to maliangay a tamdaw, I Dipongan ho o kincac ko mikowanay to niyaro' no 'Amis, cowa ko kofa, orasaka, tadamatalaway ko cimacima to kincac, away ko caay ka ngodo to kincac, tadamarorayay to kiso sanay mipangiha ano ma'araw i cowa. O misimaway to niyaro' ko tayal nangra, sa ka adihay ko masamaamaanay a tayal, matiya to o misatofangay ko pinengneng no tamdaw, patinako han, ira ko makaratay no waco tahidangen ko kincac, ira ko malapoi'ay a kararamoday mitahidang to kincac, tadamisafaay to to kincac ko kalotamdaw haratengen. Ano awaay ko kincac i cima a sato ko mamisimaw mamipa'ading to niyaro', onini ko haharateng a mingodo a mipalata'ang to tayal nangra. tatodong 韬唤(misinanot | o yin-se-ma no pisinanot) O milifetan konini a tayal, caay ka kangtan, ira kono pilifet to tireng, pilifet to tanek ato o roma a kitakit a sowal, pilicay aca to tireng no niyah, masamaanay ko harateng no miso a malakincac, tadamaroray ko tayal.
S.PHON: == kin师a师 ** == a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u kasasiro~uma no~u kin师a师 a so~uwa删, o~u taj魔i艐, tajri艐, im蓹艐 ato~u kin师a删 魔an no~u ro~uma. nikao~urira, o~u misafa艐师a删aj to~unini a s蓹ka删, mi师蓹p蓹taj to~u ma删ia艐aj a tam涩~僧aw, i 涩~僧ipo~u艐an 魔o~u o~u kin师a师 ko~u miko~uwanaj to~u nijaro~u省 no~u 省amis, 师o~uwa ko~u ko~ufa, o~urasaka, ta涩~僧amata删awaj ko~u 师ima师ima to~u kin师a师, awaj ko~u 师aaj ka 艐o~u涩~僧o~u to~u kin师a师, ta涩~僧amaro~urajaj to~u kiso~u sanaj mipa艐i魔a ano~u ma省araw i 师o~uwa. o~u misimawaj to~u nijaro~u省 ko~u taja删 na艐ra, sa ka a涩~僧i魔aj ko~u masamaamaanaj a taja删, matija to~u o~u misato~ufa艐aj ko~u pin蓹艐n蓹艐 no~u tam涩~僧aw, patinako~u 魔an, ira ko~u makarataj no~u wa师o~u ta魔i涩~僧a艐蓹n ko~u kin师a师, ira ko~u ma删apo~ui省aj a kararamo~u涩~僧aj mita魔i涩~僧a艐 to~u kin师a师, ta涩~僧amisafaaj to~u to~u kin师a师 ko~u ka删o~utam涩~僧aw 魔arat蓹艐蓹n. ano~u awaaj ko~u kin师a师 i 师ima a sato~u ko~u mamisimaw mamipa省a涩~僧i艐 to~u nijaro~u省, o~unini ko~u 魔a魔arat蓹艐 a mi艐o~u涩~僧o~u a mipa删ata省a艐 to~u taja删 na艐ra. tato~u涩~僧o~u艐 **(misinano~ut | o~u jin-s蓹-ma no~u pisinano~ut) o~u mi删if蓹tan ko~unini a taja删, 师aaj ka ka艐tan, ira ko~uno~u pi删if蓹t to~u tir蓹艐, pi删if蓹t to~u tan蓹k ato~u o~u ro~uma a kitakit a so~uwa删, pi删i师aj a师a to~u tir蓹艐 no~u nija魔, masamaanaj ko~u 魔arat蓹艐 no~u miso~u a ma删akin师a师, ta涩~僧amaro~uraj ko~u taja删.
